  "text": "The Kubernetes API server admission controller pipeline is implemented across multiple packages in kubernetes/kubernetes. Here's the comprehensive flow:\n\n## Core Admission Interfaces (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)\n\nThe foundation is defined in **interfaces.go**, which declares three key interfaces:\n- **Interface**: Base interface with Handles(operation) method\n- **MutationInterface**: Extends Interface with Admit(ctx, attributes, objectInterfaces) for mutating admission\n- **ValidationInterface**: Extends Interface with Validate(ctx, attributes, objectInterfaces) for validating admission\n\n## Admission Chain Execution (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)\n\n**chain.go** implements the core admission chain:\n- **chainAdmissionHandler**: A []Interface that processes multiple admission handlers in sequence\n- **Admit()** method: Iterates through handlers, calling Admit() on MutationInterface handlers, returning on first error\n- **Validate()** method: Iterates through handlers, calling Validate() on ValidationInterface handlers, returning on first error\n- **Handles()** method: Returns true if any handler handles the operation\n\n**reinvocation.go** wraps the chain to support reinvocation:\n- **newReinvocationHandler()**: Creates a wrapper that can reinvoke the admission chain if webhooks request re-invocation\n- Checks reinvocation context after Admit() to determine if second pass is needed\n\n## Plugin Registration and Chain Creation (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)\n\n**plugins.go** implements:\n- **Plugins** struct: Registry of admission plugin factories\n- **Register()**: Registers plugin factories by name\n- **NewFromPlugins()**: Builds admission chain from plugin names, separates mutating/validating plugins, wraps with reinvocation handler\n- Logs loaded plugins in order\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/plugins.go** implements:\n- **RegisterAllAdmissionPlugins()**: Registers core API server plugins including lifecycle, webhooks, and admission policies\n\n## Mutating Admission Ordering and Execution\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/mutating/plugin.go**:\n- **Plugin** struct implementing MutationInterface\n- **Admit()** method that delegates to generic webhook dispatcher\n- **Register()** function that registers MutatingAdmissionWebhook plugin\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/mutating/dispatcher.go**:\n- **mutatingDispatcher**: Implements generic.Dispatcher\n- **Dispatch()** method: Executes mutating webhooks, collects patches, applies them to request object\n- Handles JSON patches from webhooks and mutation audit annotations\n- Supports re-invocation if mutating webhooks request it\n\n## Validating Admission Execution\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/validating/plugin.go**:\n- **Plugin** struct implementing ValidationInterface\n- **Validate()** method that delegates to generic webhook dispatcher\n- **Register()** function that registers ValidatingAdmissionWebhook plugin\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/validating/dispatcher.go**:\n- **validatingDispatcher**: Implements generic.Dispatcher\n- **Dispatch()** method: Executes validating webhooks in parallel when possible\n- Returns validation errors without modifying the request\n- Supports fail-open mode on webhook connection failures\n\n## Generic Webhook Infrastructure\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/generic/webhook.go**:\n- **Webhook** struct: Base implementation for both mutating and validating webhooks\n- Manages webhook configuration sources, HTTP client, namespace/object matchers\n- Implements ValidateInitialization() to ensure proper setup\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/configuration/configuration_manager.go**:\n- Manages MutatingWebhookConfiguration and ValidatingWebhookConfiguration resources\n- **mutatingWebhookConfigurationManager** and **validatingWebhookConfigurationManager**: Lister-based managers for webhooks\n\n## API Server Setup\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/admission.go**:\n- **AdmissionOptions** struct holds plugin names, config file paths, decorators\n- **ApplyTo()**: Creates admission chain using Plugins.NewFromPlugins(), applies it to server config\n- RecommendedPluginOrder: [NamespaceLifecycle, MutatingAdmissionPolicy, MutatingAdmissionWebhook, ValidatingAdmissionPolicy, ValidatingAdmissionWebhook]\n\n## Kube-apiserver Specific Implementation\n\n**pkg/kubeapiserver/options/admission.go**:\n- Wraps generic AdmissionOptions with kube-apiserver specific configuration\n- Delegates to generic ApplyTo() implementation\n\n**pkg/kubeapiserver/options/plugins.go**:\n- **RegisterAllAdmissionPlugins()**: Registers all kube-apiserver admission plugins (21 in-tree plugins)\n- **AllOrderedPlugins**: Comprehensive list defining plugin execution order\n- **DefaultOffAdmissionPlugins()**: Specifies which plugins are off by default\n\n**pkg/kubeapiserver/admission/config.go** and **initializer.go**:\n- Sets up plugin initializers for dependency injection\n\n## Control Plane API Server\n\n**pkg/controlplane/apiserver/admission/config.go** and **initializer.go**:\n- Provides admission configuration for control plane API servers\n\n## Execution Flow Summary\n\nWhen a request arrives:\n1. API server calls AdmissionControl.Admit() on the reinvocation handler\n2. Reinvoker delegates to chainAdmissionHandler.Admit()\n3. Chain iterates through all registered mutating handlers in order:\n   - Mutating webhooks (with parallel execution within each webhook)\n   - Mutating admission policies\n4. Reinvoker checks if reinvocation is needed, may re-run mutations\n5. API server calls AdmissionControl.Validate() on the reinvocation handler\n6. Reinvoker delegates to chainAdmissionHandler.Validate()\n7. Chain iterates through all registered validating handlers in order:\n   - Validating webhooks (with optional parallel execution)\n   - Validating admission policies\n8. Handlers are ordered by plugin registration, with mutations always before validations\n"
}

  "text": "The Kubernetes API server admission controller pipeline is implemented across multiple packages in kubernetes/kubernetes. Here's the comprehensive flow:\n\n## Core Admission Interfaces (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)\n\nThe foundation is defined in **interfaces.go**, which declares three key interfaces:\n- **Interface**: Base interface with Handles(operation) method\n- **MutationInterface**: Extends Interface with Admit(ctx, attributes, objectInterfaces) for mutating admission\n- **ValidationInterface**: Extends Interface with Validate(ctx, attributes, objectInterfaces) for validating admission\n\n## Admission Chain Execution (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)\n\n**chain.go** implements the core admission chain:\n- **chainAdmissionHandler**: A []Interface that processes multiple admission handlers in sequence\n- **Admit()** method: Iterates through handlers, calling Admit() on MutationInterface handlers, returning on first error\n- **Validate()** method: Iterates through handlers, calling Validate() on ValidationInterface handlers, returning on first error\n- **Handles()** method: Returns true if any handler handles the operation\n\n**reinvocation.go** wraps the chain to support reinvocation:\n- **newReinvocationHandler()**: Creates a wrapper that can reinvoke the admission chain if webhooks request re-invocation\n- Checks reinvocation context after Admit() to determine if second pass is needed\n\n## Plugin Registration and Chain Creation (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)\n\n**plugins.go** implements:\n- **Plugins** struct: Registry of admission plugin factories\n- **Register()**: Registers plugin factories by name\n- **NewFromPlugins()**: Builds admission chain from plugin names, separates mutating/validating plugins, wraps with reinvocation handler\n- Logs loaded plugins in order\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/plugins.go** implements:\n- **RegisterAllAdmissionPlugins()**: Registers core API server plugins including lifecycle, webhooks, and admission policies\n\n## Mutating Admission Ordering and Execution\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/mutating/plugin.go**:\n- **Plugin** struct implementing MutationInterface\n- **Admit()** method that delegates to generic webhook dispatcher\n- **Register()** function that registers MutatingAdmissionWebhook plugin\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/mutating/dispatcher.go**:\n- **mutatingDispatcher**: Implements generic.Dispatcher\n- **Dispatch()** method: Executes mutating webhooks, collects patches, applies them to request object\n- Handles JSON patches from webhooks and mutation audit annotations\n- Supports re-invocation if mutating webhooks request it\n\n## Validating Admission Execution\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/validating/plugin.go**:\n- **Plugin** struct implementing ValidationInterface\n- **Validate()** method that delegates to generic webhook dispatcher\n- **Register()** function that registers ValidatingAdmissionWebhook plugin\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/validating/dispatcher.go**:\n- **validatingDispatcher**: Implements generic.Dispatcher\n- **Dispatch()** method: Executes validating webhooks in parallel when possible\n- Returns validation errors without modifying the request\n- Supports fail-open mode on webhook connection failures\n\n## Generic Webhook Infrastructure\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/generic/webhook.go**:\n- **Webhook** struct: Base implementation for both mutating and validating webhooks\n- Manages webhook configuration sources, HTTP client, namespace/object matchers\n- Implements ValidateInitialization() to ensure proper setup\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/configuration/configuration_manager.go**:\n- Manages MutatingWebhookConfiguration and ValidatingWebhookConfiguration resources\n- **mutatingWebhookConfigurationManager** and **validatingWebhookConfigurationManager**: Lister-based managers for webhooks\n\n## API Server Setup\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/admission.go**:\n- **AdmissionOptions** struct holds plugin names, config file paths, decorators\n- **ApplyTo()**: Creates admission chain using Plugins.NewFromPlugins(), applies it to server config\n- RecommendedPluginOrder: [NamespaceLifecycle, MutatingAdmissionPolicy, MutatingAdmissionWebhook, ValidatingAdmissionPolicy, ValidatingAdmissionWebhook]\n\n## Kube-apiserver Specific Implementation\n\n**pkg/kubeapiserver/options/admission.go**:\n- Wraps generic AdmissionOptions with kube-apiserver specific configuration\n- Delegates to generic ApplyTo() implementation\n\n**pkg/kubeapiserver/options/plugins.go**:\n- **RegisterAllAdmissionPlugins()**: Registers all kube-apiserver admission plugins (21 in-tree plugins)\n- **AllOrderedPlugins**: Comprehensive list defining plugin execution order\n- **DefaultOffAdmissionPlugins()**: Specifies which plugins are off by default\n\n**pkg/kubeapiserver/admission/config.go** and **initializer.go**:\n- Sets up plugin initializers for dependency injection\n\n## Control Plane API Server\n\n**pkg/controlplane/apiserver/admission/config.go** and **initializer.go**:\n- Provides admission configuration for control plane API servers\n\n## Execution Flow Summary\n\nWhen a request arrives:\n1. API server calls AdmissionControl.Admit() on the reinvocation handler\n2. Reinvoker delegates to chainAdmissionHandler.Admit()\n3. Chain iterates through all registered mutating handlers in order:\n   - Mutating webhooks (with parallel execution within each webhook)\n   - Mutating admission policies\n4. Reinvoker checks if reinvocation is needed, may re-run mutations\n5. API server calls AdmissionControl.Validate() on the reinvocation handler\n6. Reinvoker delegates to chainAdmissionHandler.Validate()\n7. Chain iterates through all registered validating handlers in order:\n   - Validating webhooks (with optional parallel execution)\n   - Validating admission policies\n8. Handlers are ordered by plugin registration, with mutations always before validations\n"
}

- **RegisterAllAdmissionPlugins()**: Registers core API server plugins including lifecycle, webhooks, and admission policies

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/metrics/metrics.go** implements:

- Used to track admission latency, rejections, and errors per plugin

**Interface**: Base interface with Handles(operation) method\n- **MutationInterface**: Extends Interface with Admit(ctx, attributes, objectInterfaces) for mutating admission\n- **ValidationInterface**: Extends Interface with Validate(ctx, attributes, objectInterfaces) for validating admission\n\n## Admission Chain Execution (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)\n\n**chain.go** implements the core admission chain:\n- **chainAdmissionHandler**: A []Interface that processes multiple admission handlers in sequence\n- **Admit()** method: Iterates through handlers, calling Admit() on MutationInterface handlers, returning on first error\n- **Validate()** method: Iterates through handlers, calling Validate() on ValidationInterface handlers, returning on first error\n- **Handles()** method: Returns true if any handler handles the operation\n\n**reinvocation.go** wraps the chain to support reinvocation:\n- **newReinvocationHandler()**: Creates a wrapper that can reinvoke the admission chain if webhooks request re-invocation\n- Checks reinvocation context after Admit() to determine if second pass is needed\n\n## Plugin Registration and Chain Creation (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)\n\n**plugins.go** implements:\n- **Plugins** struct: Registry of admission plugin factories\n- **Register()**: Registers plugin factories by name\n- **NewFromPlugins()**: Builds admission chain from plugin names, separates mutating/validating plugins, wraps with reinvocation handler\n- Logs loaded plugins in order\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/plugins.go** implements:\n- **RegisterAllAdmissionPlugins()**: Registers core API server plugins including lifecycle, webhooks, and admission policies\n\n## Mutating Admission Ordering and Execution\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/mutating/plugin.go**:\n- **Plugin** struct implementing MutationInterface\n- **Admit()** method that delegates to generic webhook dispatcher\n- **Register()** function that registers MutatingAdmissionWebhook plugin\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/mutating/dispatcher.go**:\n- **mutatingDispatcher**: Implements generic.Dispatcher\n- **Dispatch()** method: Executes mutating webhooks, collects patches, applies them to request object\n- Handles JSON patches from webhooks and mutation audit annotations\n- Supports re-invocation if mutating webhooks request it\n\n## Validating Admission Execution\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/validating/plugin.go**:\n- **Plugin** struct implementing ValidationInterface\n- **Validate()** method that delegates to generic webhook dispatcher\n- **Register()** function that registers ValidatingAdmissionWebhook plugin\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/validating/dispatcher.go**:\n- **validatingDispatcher**: Implements generic.Dispatcher\n- **Dispatch()** method: Executes validating webhooks in parallel when possible\n- Returns validation errors without modifying the request\n- Supports fail-open mode on webhook connection failures\n\n## Generic Webhook Infrastructure\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/generic/webhook.go**:\n- **Webhook** struct: Base implementation for both mutating and validating webhooks\n- Manages webhook configuration sources, HTTP client, namespace/object matchers\n- Implements ValidateInitialization() to ensure proper setup\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/configuration/configuration_manager.go**:\n- Manages MutatingWebhookConfiguration and ValidatingWebhookConfiguration resources\n- **mutatingWebhookConfigurationManager** and **validatingWebhookConfigurationManager**: Lister-based managers for webhooks\n\n## API Server Setup\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/admission.go**:\n- **AdmissionOptions** struct holds plugin names, config file paths, decorators\n- **ApplyTo()**: Creates admission chain using Plugins.NewFromPlugins(), applies it to server config\n- RecommendedPluginOrder: [NamespaceLifecycle, MutatingAdmissionPolicy, MutatingAdmissionWebhook, ValidatingAdmissionPolicy, ValidatingAdmissionWebhook]\n\n## Kube-apiserver Specific Implementation\n\n**pkg/kubeapiserver/options/admission.go**:\n- Wraps generic AdmissionOptions with kube-apiserver specific configuration\n- Delegates to generic ApplyTo() implementation\n\n**pkg/kubeapiserver/options/plugins.go**:\n- **RegisterAllAdmissionPlugins()**: Registers all kube-apiserver admission plugins (21 in-tree plugins)\n- **AllOrderedPlugins**: Comprehensive list defining plugin execution order\n- **DefaultOffAdmissionPlugins()**: Specifies which plugins are off by default\n\n**pkg/kubeapiserver/admission/config.go** and **initializer.go**:\n- Sets up plugin initializers for dependency injection\n\n## Control Plane API Server\n\n**pkg/controlplane/apiserver/admission/config.go** and **initializer.go**:\n- Provides admission configuration for control plane API servers\n\n## Execution Flow Summary\n\nWhen a request arrives:\n1. API server calls AdmissionControl.Admit() on the reinvocation handler\n2. Reinvoker delegates to chainAdmissionHandler.Admit()\n3. Chain iterates through all registered mutating handlers in order:\n   - Mutating webhooks (with parallel execution within each webhook)\n   - Mutating admission policies\n4. Reinvoker checks if reinvocation is needed, may re-run mutations\n5. API server calls AdmissionControl.Validate() on the reinvocation handler\n6. Reinvoker delegates to chainAdmissionHandler.Validate()\n7. Chain iterates through all registered validating handlers in order:\n   - Validating webhooks (with optional parallel execution)\n   - Validating admission policies\n8. Handlers are ordered by plugin registration, with mutations always before validations\n"

arguments.new_string:
## Admission Policies (CEL-based Rules)

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/mutating/plugin.go**:
- **Plugin** struct implementing MutationInterface
- **Admit()** method that delegates to policy dispatcher
- **Register()** function that registers MutatingAdmissionPolicy plugin
- Evaluates CEL rules to apply mutations using JSONPatch

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/mutating/dispatcher.go**:
- **Dispatcher** implementation that evaluates mutating policies
- Compiles CEL rules and applies patches to requests
- Supports policy composition and ordering

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/validating/plugin.go**:
- **Plugin** struct implementing ValidationInterface
- **Validate()** method that delegates to policy dispatcher
- **Register()** function that registers ValidatingAdmissionPolicy plugin
- Evaluates CEL rules to validate requests

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/validating/dispatcher.go**:
- **Dispatcher** implementation that evaluates validating policies
- Compiles CEL rules and returns validation errors
- Supports policy composition and ordering

## Generic Webhook Infrastructure

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/generic/webhook.go**:
- **Webhook** struct: Base implementation for both mutating and validating webhooks
- Manages webhook configuration sources, HTTP client, namespace/object matchers
- Implements ValidateInitialization() to ensure proper setup

- Implements ValidateInitialization() to ensure proper setup

  "text": "The Kubernetes API server admission controller pipeline is implemented across multiple packages in kubernetes/kubernetes. Here's the comprehensive flow:\n\n## Core Admission Interfaces (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)\n\nThe foundation is defined in **interfaces.go**, which declares three key interfaces:\n- **Interface**: Base interface with Handles(operation) method\n- **MutationInterface**: Extends Interface with Admit(ctx, attributes, objectInterfaces) for mutating admission\n- **ValidationInterface**: Extends Interface with Validate(ctx, attributes, objectInterfaces) for validating admission\n\n## Admission Chain Execution (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)\n\n**chain.go** implements the core admission chain:\n- **chainAdmissionHandler**: A []Interface that processes multiple admission handlers in sequence\n- **Admit()** method: Iterates through handlers, calling Admit() on MutationInterface handlers, returning on first error\n- **Validate()** method: Iterates through handlers, calling Validate() on ValidationInterface handlers, returning on first error\n- **Handles()** method: Returns true if any handler handles the operation\n\n**reinvocation.go** wraps the chain to support reinvocation:\n- **newReinvocationHandler()**: Creates a wrapper that can reinvoke the admission chain if webhooks request re-invocation\n- Checks reinvocation context after Admit() to determine if second pass is needed\n\n## Plugin Registration and Chain Creation (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)\n\n**plugins.go** implements:\n- **Plugins** struct: Registry of admission plugin factories\n- **Register()**: Registers plugin factories by name\n- **NewFromPlugins()**: Builds admission chain from plugin names, separates mutating/validating plugins, wraps with reinvocation handler\n- Logs loaded plugins in order\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/plugins.go** implements:\n- **RegisterAllAdmissionPlugins()**: Registers core API server plugins including lifecycle, webhooks, and admission policies\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/metrics/metrics.go** implements:\n- **WithStepMetrics()**: Decorator that wraps the admission chain to record admission metrics\n- Used to track admission latency, rejections, and errors per plugin\n\n## Mutating Admission Ordering and Execution\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/mutating/plugin.go**:\n- **Plugin** struct implementing MutationInterface\n- **Admit()** method that delegates to generic webhook dispatcher\n- **Register()** function that registers MutatingAdmissionWebhook plugin\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/mutating/dispatcher.go**:\n- **mutatingDispatcher**: Implements generic.Dispatcher\n- **Dispatch()** method: Executes mutating webhooks, collects patches, applies them to request object\n- Handles JSON patches from webhooks and mutation audit annotations\n- Supports re-invocation if mutating webhooks request it\n\n## Validating Admission Execution\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/validating/plugin.go**:\n- **Plugin** struct implementing ValidationInterface\n- **Validate()** method that delegates to generic webhook dispatcher\n- **Register()** function that registers ValidatingAdmissionWebhook plugin\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/validating/dispatcher.go**:\n- **validatingDispatcher**: Implements generic.Dispatcher\n- **Dispatch()** method: Executes validating webhooks in parallel when possible\n- Returns validation errors without modifying the request\n- Supports fail-open mode on webhook connection failures\n\n## Generic Webhook Infrastructure\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/generic/webhook.go**:\n- **Webhook** struct: Base implementation for both mutating and validating webhooks\n- Manages webhook configuration sources, HTTP client, namespace/object matchers\n- Implements ValidateInitialization() to ensure proper setup\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/configuration/configuration_manager.go**:\n- Manages MutatingWebhookConfiguration and ValidatingWebhookConfiguration resources\n- **mutatingWebhookConfigurationManager** and **validatingWebhookConfigurationManager**: Lister-based managers for webhooks\n\n## API Server Setup\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/admission.go**:\n- **AdmissionOptions** struct holds plugin names, config file paths, decorators\n- **ApplyTo()**: Creates admission chain using Plugins.NewFromPlugins(), applies it to server config\n- RecommendedPluginOrder: [NamespaceLifecycle, MutatingAdmissionPolicy, MutatingAdmissionWebhook, ValidatingAdmissionPolicy, ValidatingAdmissionWebhook]\n\n## Kube-apiserver Specific Implementation\n\n**pkg/kubeapiserver/options/admission.go**:\n- Wraps generic AdmissionOptions with kube-apiserver specific configuration\n- Delegates to generic ApplyTo() implementation\n\n**pkg/kubeapiserver/options/plugins.go**:\n- **RegisterAllAdmissionPlugins()**: Registers all kube-apiserver admission plugins (21 in-tree plugins)\n- **AllOrderedPlugins**: Comprehensive list defining plugin execution order\n- **DefaultOffAdmissionPlugins()**: Specifies which plugins are off by default\n\n**pkg/kubeapiserver/admission/config.go** and **initializer.go**:\n- Sets up plugin initializers for dependency injection\n\n## Control Plane API Server\n\n**pkg/controlplane/apiserver/admission/config.go** and **initializer.go**:\n- Provides admission configuration for control plane API servers\n\n## Execution Flow Summary\n\nWhen a request arrives:\n1. API server calls AdmissionControl.Admit() on the reinvocation handler\n2. Reinvoker delegates to chainAdmissionHandler.Admit()\n3. Chain iterates through all registered mutating handlers in order:\n   - Mutating webhooks (with parallel execution within each webhook)\n   - Mutating admission policies\n4. Reinvoker checks if reinvocation is needed, may re-run mutations\n5. API server calls AdmissionControl.Validate() on the reinvocation handler\n6. Reinvoker delegates to chainAdmissionHandler.Validate()\n7. Chain iterates through all registered validating handlers in order:\n   - Validating webhooks (with optional parallel execution)\n   - Validating admission policies\n8. Handlers are ordered by plugin registration, with mutations always before validations\n"
}

arguments.new_string:
## API Server Setup and Integration

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/config.go**:
- **Config** struct has AdmissionControl field (admission.Interface)
- AdmissionControl is stored in REST handler context
- Used to process all requests through the admission pipeline

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/admission.go**:
- **AdmissionOptions** struct holds plugin names, config file paths, decorators
- **ApplyTo()**: Creates admission chain using Plugins.NewFromPlugins(), wraps with metrics decorator, applies it to server config
- RecommendedPluginOrder: [NamespaceLifecycle, MutatingAdmissionPolicy, MutatingAdmissionWebhook, ValidatingAdmissionPolicy, ValidatingAdmissionWebhook]"
arguments.old_string:
## API Server Setup

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/admission.go**:
- **AdmissionOptions** struct holds plugin names, config file paths, decorators
- **ApplyTo()**: Creates admission chain using Plugins.NewFromPlugins(), applies it to server config
- RecommendedPluginOrder: [NamespaceLifecycle, MutatingAdmissionPolicy, MutatingAdmissionWebhook, ValidatingAdmissionPolicy, ValidatingAdmissionWebhook]

input.new_string:
## API Server Setup and Integration

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/config.go**:
- **Config** struct has AdmissionControl field (admission.Interface)
- AdmissionControl is stored in REST handler context
- Used to process all requests through the admission pipeline

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/admission.go**:
- **AdmissionOptions** struct holds plugin names, config file paths, decorators
- **ApplyTo()**: Creates admission chain using Plugins.NewFromPlugins(), wraps with metrics decorator, applies it to server config
- RecommendedPluginOrder: [NamespaceLifecycle, MutatingAdmissionPolicy, MutatingAdmissionWebhook, ValidatingAdmissionPolicy, ValidatingAdmissionWebhook]"
input.old_string:
## API Server Setup

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/admission.go**:
- **AdmissionOptions** struct holds plugin names, config file paths, decorators
- **ApplyTo()**: Creates admission chain using Plugins.NewFromPlugins(), applies it to server config
- RecommendedPluginOrder: [NamespaceLifecycle, MutatingAdmissionPolicy, MutatingAdmissionWebhook, ValidatingAdmissionPolicy, ValidatingAdmissionWebhook]

  "text": "The Kubernetes API server admission controller pipeline is implemented across multiple packages in kubernetes/kubernetes. Here's the comprehensive flow:\n\n## Core Admission Interfaces (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)\n\nThe foundation is defined in **interfaces.go**, which declares three key interfaces:\n- **Interface**: Base interface with Handles(operation) method\n- **MutationInterface**: Extends Interface with Admit(ctx, attributes, objectInterfaces) for mutating admission\n- **ValidationInterface**: Extends Interface with Validate(ctx, attributes, objectInterfaces) for validating admission\n\n## Admission Chain Execution (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)\n\n**chain.go** implements the core admission chain:\n- **chainAdmissionHandler**: A []Interface that processes multiple admission handlers in sequence\n- **Admit()** method: Iterates through handlers, calling Admit() on MutationInterface handlers, returning on first error\n- **Validate()** method: Iterates through handlers, calling Validate() on ValidationInterface handlers, returning on first error\n- **Handles()** method: Returns true if any handler handles the operation\n\n**reinvocation.go** wraps the chain to support reinvocation:\n- **newReinvocationHandler()**: Creates a wrapper that can reinvoke the admission chain if webhooks request re-invocation\n- Checks reinvocation context after Admit() to determine if second pass is needed\n\n## Plugin Registration and Chain Creation (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)\n\n**plugins.go** implements:\n- **Plugins** struct: Registry of admission plugin factories\n- **Register()**: Registers plugin factories by name\n- **NewFromPlugins()**: Builds admission chain from plugin names, separates mutating/validating plugins, wraps with reinvocation handler\n- Logs loaded plugins in order\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/plugins.go** implements:\n- **RegisterAllAdmissionPlugins()**: Registers core API server plugins including lifecycle, webhooks, and admission policies\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/metrics/metrics.go** implements:\n- **WithStepMetrics()**: Decorator that wraps the admission chain to record admission metrics\n- Used to track admission latency, rejections, and errors per plugin\n\n## Mutating Admission Ordering and Execution\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/mutating/plugin.go**:\n- **Plugin** struct implementing MutationInterface\n- **Admit()** method that delegates to generic webhook dispatcher\n- **Register()** function that registers MutatingAdmissionWebhook plugin\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/mutating/dispatcher.go**:\n- **mutatingDispatcher**: Implements generic.Dispatcher\n- **Dispatch()** method: Executes mutating webhooks, collects patches, applies them to request object\n- Handles JSON patches from webhooks and mutation audit annotations\n- Supports re-invocation if mutating webhooks request it\n\n## Validating Admission Execution\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/validating/plugin.go**:\n- **Plugin** struct implementing ValidationInterface\n- **Validate()** method that delegates to generic webhook dispatcher\n- **Register()** function that registers ValidatingAdmissionWebhook plugin\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/validating/dispatcher.go**:\n- **validatingDispatcher**: Implements generic.Dispatcher\n- **Dispatch()** method: Executes validating webhooks in parallel when possible\n- Returns validation errors without modifying the request\n- Supports fail-open mode on webhook connection failures\n\n## Admission Policies (CEL-based Rules)\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/mutating/plugin.go**:\n- **Plugin** struct implementing MutationInterface\n- **Admit()** method that delegates to policy dispatcher\n- **Register()** function that registers MutatingAdmissionPolicy plugin\n- Evaluates CEL rules to apply mutations using JSONPatch\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/mutating/dispatcher.go**:\n- **Dispatcher** implementation that evaluates mutating policies\n- Compiles CEL rules and applies patches to requests\n- Supports policy composition and ordering\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/validating/plugin.go**:\n- **Plugin** struct implementing ValidationInterface\n- **Validate()** method that delegates to policy dispatcher\n- **Register()** function that registers ValidatingAdmissionPolicy plugin\n- Evaluates CEL rules to validate requests\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/validating/dispatcher.go**:\n- **Dispatcher** implementation that evaluates validating policies\n- Compiles CEL rules and returns validation errors\n- Supports policy composition and ordering\n\n## Generic Webhook Infrastructure\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/generic/webhook.go**:\n- **Webhook** struct: Base implementation for both mutating and validating webhooks\n- Manages webhook configuration sources, HTTP client, namespace/object matchers\n- Implements ValidateInitialization() to ensure proper setup\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/configuration/configuration_manager.go**:\n- Manages MutatingWebhookConfiguration and ValidatingWebhookConfiguration resources\n- **mutatingWebhookConfigurationManager** and **validatingWebhookConfigurationManager**: Lister-based managers for webhooks\n\n## API Server Setup\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/admission.go**:\n- **AdmissionOptions** struct holds plugin names, config file paths, decorators\n- **ApplyTo()**: Creates admission chain using Plugins.NewFromPlugins(), applies it to server config\n- RecommendedPluginOrder: [NamespaceLifecycle, MutatingAdmissionPolicy, MutatingAdmissionWebhook, ValidatingAdmissionPolicy, ValidatingAdmissionWebhook]\n\n## Kube-apiserver Specific Implementation\n\n**pkg/kubeapiserver/options/admission.go**:\n- Wraps generic AdmissionOptions with kube-apiserver specific configuration\n- Delegates to generic ApplyTo() implementation\n\n**pkg/kubeapiserver/options/plugins.go**:\n- **RegisterAllAdmissionPlugins()**: Registers all kube-apiserver admission plugins (21 in-tree plugins)\n- **AllOrderedPlugins**: Comprehensive list defining plugin execution order\n- **DefaultOffAdmissionPlugins()**: Specifies which plugins are off by default\n\n**pkg/kubeapiserver/admission/config.go** and **initializer.go**:\n- Sets up plugin initializers for dependency injection\n\n## Control Plane API Server\n\n**pkg/controlplane/apiserver/admission/config.go** and **initializer.go**:\n- Provides admission configuration for control plane API servers\n\n## Execution Flow Summary\n\nWhen a request arrives:\n1. API server calls AdmissionControl.Admit() on the reinvocation handler\n2. Reinvoker delegates to chainAdmissionHandler.Admit()\n3. Chain iterates through all registered mutating handlers in order:\n   - Mutating webhooks (with parallel execution within each webhook)\n   - Mutating admission policies\n4. Reinvoker checks if reinvocation is needed, may re-run mutations\n5. API server calls AdmissionControl.Validate() on the reinvocation handler\n6. Reinvoker delegates to chainAdmissionHandler.Validate()\n7. Chain iterates through all registered validating handlers in order:\n   - Validating webhooks (with optional parallel execution)\n   - Validating admission policies\n8. Handlers are ordered by plugin registration, with mutations always before validations\n"
}

arguments.new_string:
## Metrics and Decorators

The admission chain is wrapped with decorators:
- **WithStepMetrics()** (metrics/metrics.go): Records admission latency, rejections, and errors per plugin
- Decorators are applied in inside-out order during ApplyTo()
- Metrics decorator wraps individual handlers to instrument admission pipeline

## Execution Flow Summary

When a request arrives at the API server:
1. REST handler calls AdmissionControl.Admit() (wrapped by metrics decorator and reinvocation handler)
2. Metrics decorator records start time for this step
3. Reinvoker delegates to chainAdmissionHandler.Admit()
4. Chain iterates through all registered mutating handlers in order:
   - NamespaceLifecycle (namespace existence checks)
   - MutatingAdmissionPolicy (CEL-based mutation rules)
   - MutatingAdmissionWebhook (webhooks that mutate requests)
   - Each handler is wrapped by metrics decorator
5. Reinvoker checks if reinvocation is needed:
   - If any mutating handler set ShouldReinvoke flag, re-run mutations
   - Allows webhooks to react to mutations from other webhooks
6. REST handler calls AdmissionControl.Validate()
7. Metrics decorator records start time for validation step
8. Reinvoker delegates to chainAdmissionHandler.Validate()
9. Chain iterates through all registered validating handlers in order:
   - ValidatingAdmissionPolicy (CEL-based validation rules)
   - ValidatingAdmissionWebhook (webhooks that validate requests)
   - Each handler is wrapped by metrics decorator
10. Metrics decorator records latency and reports success/failure
11. Returns to REST handler with admission decision

## Key Design Patterns

- **Chain of Responsibility**: Multiple handlers form a chain, each can process or reject requests
- **Separation of Concerns**: Mutating handlers always run before validating handlers
- **Decorator Pattern**: Metrics, decorators wrap handlers to add cross-cutting concerns
- **Factory Pattern**: Plugins.Register() and NewFromPlugins() create chains from named plugins
- **Reinvocation Policy**: Webhooks can request re-invocation to react to mutations
- **Configuration Driven**: Plugins loaded via configuration, not hard-coded
"

    75→  "text": "The Kubernetes API server admission controller pipeline is implemented across multiple packages in kubernetes/kubernetes. Here's the comprehensive flow:

## Core Admission Interfaces (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)

The foundation is defined in **interfaces.go**, which declares three key interfaces:
- **Interface**: Base interface with Handles(operation) method
- **MutationInterface**: Extends Interface with Admit(ctx, attributes, objectInterfaces) for mutating admission
- **ValidationInterface**: Extends Interface with Validate(ctx, attributes, objectInterfaces) for validating admission

## Admission Chain Execution (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)

**chain.go** implements the core admission chain:
- **chainAdmissionHandler**: A []Interface that processes multiple admission handlers in sequence
- **Admit()** method: Iterates through handlers, calling Admit() on MutationInterface handlers, returning on first error
- **Validate()** method: Iterates through handlers, calling Validate() on ValidationInterface handlers, returning on first error
- **Handles()** method: Returns true if any handler handles the operation

**reinvocation.go** wraps the chain to support reinvocation:
- **newReinvocationHandler()**: Creates a wrapper that can reinvoke the admission chain if webhooks request re-invocation
- Checks reinvocation context after Admit() to determine if second pass is needed

## Plugin Registration and Chain Creation (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)

**plugins.go** implements:
- **Plugins** struct: Registry of admission plugin factories
- **Register()**: Registers plugin factories by name
- **NewFromPlugins()**: Builds admission chain from plugin names, separates mutating/validating plugins, wraps with reinvocation handler
- Logs loaded plugins in order

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/plugins.go** implements:
- **RegisterAllAdmissionPlugins()**: Registers core API server plugins including lifecycle, webhooks, and admission policies

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/metrics/metrics.go** implements:
- **WithStepMetrics()**: Decorator that wraps the admission chain to record admission metrics
- Used to track admission latency, rejections, and errors per plugin

## Mutating Admission Ordering and Execution

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/mutating/plugin.go**:
- **Plugin** struct implementing MutationInterface
- **Admit()** method that delegates to generic webhook dispatcher
- **Register()** function that registers MutatingAdmissionWebhook plugin

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/mutating/dispatcher.go**:
- **mutatingDispatcher**: Implements generic.Dispatcher
- **Dispatch()** method: Executes mutating webhooks, collects patches, applies them to request object
- Handles JSON patches from webhooks and mutation audit annotations
- Supports re-invocation if mutating webhooks request it

## Validating Admission Execution

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/validating/plugin.go**:
- **Plugin** struct implementing ValidationInterface
- **Validate()** method that delegates to generic webhook dispatcher
- **Register()** function that registers ValidatingAdmissionWebhook plugin

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/validating/dispatcher.go**:
- **validatingDispatcher**: Implements generic.Dispatcher
- **Dispatch()** method: Executes validating webhooks in parallel when possible
- Returns validation errors without modifying the request
- Supports fail-open mode on webhook connection failures

## Admission Policies (CEL-based Rules)

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/mutating/plugin.go**:
- **Plugin** struct implementing MutationInterface
- **Admit()** method that delegates to policy dispatcher
- **Register()** function that registers MutatingAdmissionPolicy plugin
- Evaluates CEL rules to apply mutations using JSONPatch

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/mutating/dispatcher.go**:
- **Dispatcher** implementation that evaluates mutating policies
- Compiles CEL rules and applies patches to requests
- Supports policy composition and ordering

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/validating/plugin.go**:
- **Plugin** struct implementing ValidationInterface
- **Validate()** method that delegates to policy dispatcher
- **Register()** function that registers ValidatingAdmissionPolicy plugin
- Evaluates CEL rules to validate requests

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/validating/dispatcher.go**:
- **Dispatcher** implementation that evaluates validating policies
- Compiles CEL rules and returns validation errors
- Supports policy composition and ordering

## Generic Webhook Infrastructure

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/generic/webhook.go**:
- **Webhook** struct: Base implementation for both mutating and validating webhooks
- Manages webhook configuration sources, HTTP client, namespace/object matchers
- Implements ValidateInitialization() to ensure proper setup

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/configuration/configuration_manager.go**:
- Manages MutatingWebhookConfiguration and ValidatingWebhookConfiguration resources
- **mutatingWebhookConfigurationManager** and **validatingWebhookConfigurationManager**: Lister-based managers for webhooks

## API Server Setup and Integration

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/config.go**:
- **Config** struct has AdmissionControl field (admission.Interface)
- AdmissionControl is stored in REST handler context
- Used to process all requests through the admission pipeline

**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/admission.go**:
- **AdmissionOptions** struct holds plugin names, config file paths, decorators
- **ApplyTo()**: Creates admission chain using Plugins.NewFromPlugins(), wraps with metrics decorator, applies it to server config
- RecommendedPluginOrder: [NamespaceLifecycle, MutatingAdmissionPolicy, MutatingAdmissionWebhook, ValidatingAdmissionPolicy, ValidatingAdmissionWebhook]"

## Kube-apiserver Specific Implementation

**pkg/kubeapiserver/options/admission.go**:
- Wraps generic AdmissionOptions with kube-apiserver specific configuration
- Delegates to generic ApplyTo() implementation

**pkg/kubeapiserver/options/plugins.go**:
- **RegisterAllAdmissionPlugins()**: Registers all kube-apiserver admission plugins (21 in-tree plugins)
- **AllOrderedPlugins**: Comprehensive list defining plugin execution order
- **DefaultOffAdmissionPlugins()**: Specifies which plugins are off by default

**pkg/kubeapiserver/admission/config.go** and **initializer.go**:
- Sets up plugin initializers for dependency injection

## Control Plane API Server

**pkg/controlplane/apiserver/admission/config.go** and **initializer.go**:
- Provides admission configuration for control plane API servers

## Metrics and Decorators

The admission chain is wrapped with decorators:
- **WithStepMetrics()** (metrics/metrics.go): Records admission latency, rejections, and errors per plugin
- Decorators are applied in inside-out order during ApplyTo()
- Metrics decorator wraps individual handlers to instrument admission pipeline

## Execution Flow Summary

When a request arrives at the API server:
1. REST handler calls AdmissionControl.Admit() (wrapped by metrics decorator and reinvocation handler)
2. Metrics decorator records start time for this step
3. Reinvoker delegates to chainAdmissionHandler.Admit()
4. Chain iterates through all registered mutating handlers in order:
   - NamespaceLifecycle (namespace existence checks)
   - MutatingAdmissionPolicy (CEL-based mutation rules)
   - MutatingAdmissionWebhook (webhooks that mutate requests)
   - Each handler is wrapped by metrics decorator
5. Reinvoker checks if reinvocation is needed:
   - If any mutating handler set ShouldReinvoke flag, re-run mutations
   - Allows webhooks to react to mutations from other webhooks
6. REST handler calls AdmissionControl.Validate()
7. Metrics decorator records start time for validation step
8. Reinvoker delegates to chainAdmissionHandler.Validate()
9. Chain iterates through all registered validating handlers in order:
   - ValidatingAdmissionPolicy (CEL-based validation rules)
   - ValidatingAdmissionWebhook (webhooks that validate requests)
   - Each handler is wrapped by metrics decorator
10. Metrics decorator records latency and reports success/failure
11. Returns to REST handler with admission decision

## Key Design Patterns

- **Chain of Responsibility**: Multiple handlers form a chain, each can process or reject requests
- **Separation of Concerns**: Mutating handlers always run before validating handlers
- **Decorator Pattern**: Metrics, decorators wrap handlers to add cross-cutting concerns
- **Factory Pattern**: Plugins.Register() and NewFromPlugins() create chains from named plugins
- **Reinvocation Policy**: Webhooks can request re-invocation to react to mutations
- **Configuration Driven**: Plugins loaded via configuration, not hard-coded
"

(staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)\n\n**chain.go** implements the core admission chain:\n- **chainAdmissionHandler**: A []Interface that processes multiple admission handlers in sequence\n- **Admit()** method: Iterates through handlers, calling Admit() on MutationInterface handlers, returning on first error\n- **Validate()** method: Iterates through handlers, calling Validate() on ValidationInterface handlers, returning on first error\n- **Handles()** method: Returns true if any handler handles the operation\n\n**reinvocation.go** wraps the chain to support reinvocation:\n- **newReinvocationHandler()**: Creates a wrapper that can reinvoke the admission chain if webhooks request re-invocation\n- Checks reinvocation context after Admit() to determine if second pass is needed\n\n## Plugin Registration and Chain Creation (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)\n\n**plugins.go** implements:\n- **Plugins** struct: Registry of admission plugin factories\n- **Register()**: Registers plugin factories by name\n- **NewFromPlugins()**: Builds admission chain from plugin names, separates mutating/validating plugins, wraps with reinvocation handler\n- Logs loaded plugins in order\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/plugins.go** implements:\n- **RegisterAllAdmissionPlugins()**: Registers core API server plugins including lifecycle, webhooks, and admission policies\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/metrics/metrics.go** implements:\n- **WithStepMetrics()**: Decorator that wraps the admission chain to record admission metrics\n- Used to track admission latency, rejections, and errors per plugin\n\n## Mutating Admission Ordering and Execution\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/mutating/plugin.go**:\n- **Plugin** struct implementing MutationInterface\n- **Admit()** method that delegates to generic webhook dispatcher\n- **Register()** function that registers MutatingAdmissionWebhook plugin\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/mutating/dispatcher.go**:\n- **mutatingDispatcher**: Implements generic.Dispatcher\n- **Dispatch()** method: Executes mutating webhooks, collects patches, applies them to request object\n- Handles JSON patches from webhooks and mutation audit annotations\n- Supports re-invocation if mutating webhooks request it\n\n## Validating Admission Execution\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/validating/plugin.go**:\n- **Plugin** struct implementing ValidationInterface\n- **Validate()** method that delegates to generic webhook dispatcher\n- **Register()** function that registers ValidatingAdmissionWebhook plugin\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/validating/dispatcher.go**:\n- **validatingDispatcher**: Implements generic.Dispatcher\n- **Dispatch()** method: Executes validating webhooks in parallel when possible\n- Returns validation errors without modifying the request\n- Supports fail-open mode on webhook connection failures\n\n## Admission Policies (CEL-based Rules)\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/mutating/plugin.go**:\n- **Plugin** struct implementing MutationInterface\n- **Admit()** method that delegates to policy dispatcher\n- **Register()** function that registers MutatingAdmissionPolicy plugin\n- Evaluates CEL rules to apply mutations using JSONPatch\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/mutating/dispatcher.go**:\n- **Dispatcher** implementation that evaluates mutating policies\n- Compiles CEL rules and applies patches to requests\n- Supports policy composition and ordering\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/validating/plugin.go**:\n- **Plugin** struct implementing ValidationInterface\n- **Validate()** method that delegates to policy dispatcher\n- **Register()** function that registers ValidatingAdmissionPolicy plugin\n- Evaluates CEL rules to validate requests\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/validating/dispatcher.go**:\n- **Dispatcher** implementation that evaluates validating policies\n- Compiles CEL rules and returns validation errors\n- Supports policy composition and ordering\n\n## Generic Webhook Infrastructure\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/generic/webhook.go**:\n- **Webhook** struct: Base implementation for both mutating and validating webhooks\n- Manages webhook configuration sources, HTTP client, namespace/object matchers\n- Implements ValidateInitialization() to ensure proper setup\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/configuration/configuration_manager.go**:\n- Manages MutatingWebhookConfiguration and ValidatingWebhookConfiguration resources\n- **mutatingWebhookConfigurationManager** and **validatingWebhookConfigurationManager**: Lister-based managers for webhooks\n\n## API Server Setup and Integration\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/config.go**:\n- **Config** struct has AdmissionControl field (admission.Interface)\n- AdmissionControl is stored in REST handler context\n- Used to process all requests through the admission pipeline\n\n**staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/admission.go**:\n- **AdmissionOptions** struct holds plugin names, config file paths, decorators\n- **ApplyTo()**: Creates admission chain using Plugins.NewFromPlugins(), wraps with metrics decorator, applies it to server config\n- RecommendedPluginOrder: [NamespaceLifecycle, MutatingAdmissionPolicy, MutatingAdmissionWebhook, ValidatingAdmissionPolicy, ValidatingAdmissionWebhook]"\n\n## Kube-apiserver Specific Implementation\n\n**pkg/kubeapiserver/options/admission.go**:\n- Wraps generic AdmissionOptions with kube-apiserver specific configuration\n- Delegates to generic ApplyTo() implementation\n\n**pkg/kubeapiserver/options/plugins.go**:\n- **RegisterAllAdmissionPlugins()**: Registers all kube-apiserver admission plugins (21 in-tree plugins)\n- **AllOrderedPlugins**: Comprehensive list defining plugin execution order\n- **DefaultOffAdmissionPlugins()**: Specifies which plugins are off by default\n\n**pkg/kubeapiserver/admission/config.go** and **initializer.go**:\n- Sets up plugin initializers for dependency injection\n\n## Control Plane API Server\n\n**pkg/controlplane/apiserver/admission/config.go** and **initializer.go**:\n- Provides admission configuration for control plane API servers\n\n## Metrics and Decorators\n\nThe admission chain is wrapped with decorators:\n- **WithStepMetrics()** (metrics/metrics.go): Records admission latency, rejections, and errors per plugin\n- Decorators are applied in inside-out order during ApplyTo()\n- Metrics decorator wraps individual handlers to instrument admission pipeline\n\n## Execution Flow Summary\n\nWhen a request arrives at the API server:\n1. REST handler calls AdmissionControl.Admit() (wrapped by metrics decorator and reinvocation handler)\n2. Metrics decorator records start time for this step\n3. Reinvoker delegates to chainAdmissionHandler.Admit()\n4. Chain iterates through all registered mutating handlers in order:\n   - NamespaceLifecycle (namespace existence checks)\n   - MutatingAdmissionPolicy (CEL-based mutation rules)\n   - MutatingAdmissionWebhook (webhooks that mutate requests)\n   - Each handler is wrapped by metrics decorator\n5. Reinvoker checks if reinvocation is needed:\n   - If any mutating handler set ShouldReinvoke flag, re-run mutations\n   - Allows webhooks to react to mutations from other webhooks\n6. REST handler calls AdmissionControl.Validate()\n7. Metrics decorator records start time for validation step\n8. Reinvoker delegates to chainAdmissionHandler.Validate()\n9. Chain iterates through all registered validating handlers in order:\n   - ValidatingAdmissionPolicy (CEL-based validation rules)\n   - ValidatingAdmissionWebhook (webhooks that validate requests)\n   - Each handler is wrapped by metrics decorator\n10. Metrics decorator records latency and reports success/failure\n11. Returns to REST handler with admission decision\n\n## Key Design Patterns\n\n- **Chain of Responsibility**: Multiple handlers form a chain, each can process or reject requests\n- **Separation of Concerns**: Mutating handlers always run before validating handlers\n- **Decorator Pattern**: Metrics, decorators wrap handlers to add cross-cutting concerns\n- **Factory Pattern**: Plugins.Register() and NewFromPlugins() create chains from named plugins\n- **Reinvocation Policy**: Webhooks can request re-invocation to react to mutations\n- **Configuration Driven**: Plugins loaded via configuration, not hard-coded\n"
}
